title: dipsacus sylvestris subsp. ferox
intro: Dipsacus sylvestris subsp. ferox, also known as the fierce teasel or teasel, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the teasel family (Dipsacaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. Dipsacus sylvestris subsp. ferox can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
